annotations.title: The prayer of David.
annotations.text: This Psalm of the matter contained is called a prayer. Which holy David so composed <mn>◦</mn>, as was both convenient for himself, being molested with unjust afflictions by the wicked, and for any other just person, or the whole Church in persecution, serving as a spiritual sword to strike the enemies, and as a shield to bear off with patience and fortitude all their forces.

notes.text: This Psalm called a Prayer is both a sword & buckler in affliction.
